summary: Recette UI V5.1 — Complete product rendering verification for 5 test scenarios. All 10 test cases passed. Both organizer (testuser_audit@nlyt.app) and participant (igaal@hotmail.com) perspectives verified. V5.1 rule correctly applied: only accepted_guaranteed participants enter declarative phase, non-guaranteed are auto-waived.

issues: S2 and S4 show 'Vérification en cours' label even though declarative_phase=not_needed. This is technically correct (participant sees their own record status which is manual_review for organizer), but could be confusing. Consider showing 'Aucune pénalité applicable' more prominently.

critical_code_review_comments: V5.1 rule correctly implemented: non-guaranteed participants are auto-waived with decision_source='non_guaranteed_auto_waived'
Attendance sheets correctly created only for guaranteed participants (S1: 2 sheets, S3: 2 sheets)
Non-guaranteed participants correctly excluded from attendance sheet targets (S3: Fresh User not a target)
S2/S4 correctly have declarative_phase='not_needed' and 0 attendance sheets
S5 correctly shows 'Engagement respecté — aucune pénalité' with all records resolved as on_time
seed_data_creation: 5 test scenarios (ui-recette-s1 to s5) pre-seeded in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recette UI V5.1 complete. 5 test scenarios verified: S1 (2 guaranteed, collecting), S2 (1 non-guaranteed, not_needed), S3 (mix, collecting), S4 (<2 guaranteed, not_needed), S5 (resolved). All V5.1 rules correctly applied.

dashboard_historique.details: 5 RDV appear in timeline. All show 'Confirmé' badge (participant view). S1/S3 show 'Vérification en cours', S2/S4 show 'Vérification en cours', S5 shows 'Engagement respecté'.

presences_page.details: 2 pending sheets: S1 and S3 (correct). S2/S4/S5 do NOT show pending sheets (correct).

decisions_page.details: No decisions rendered yet (correct - S5 resolved via declarative, not dispute).

s1_sheet_targets.details: 2 targets: Igaal Hanouna + Vous-même (self-declaration). Only guaranteed participants.

s3_sheet_targets.details: 2 targets: Igaal Hanouna + Vous-même. Non-guaranteed participant (Fresh User) NOT a target (correct).

dashboard_historique.details: 5 RDV appear. S1/S3: 'Confirmé' + 'Vérification en cours'. S2/S4: 'Garantie en attente' + 'Aucune pénalité applicable'. S5: 'Confirmé' + 'Engagement respecté'.

presences_page.details: 2 pending sheets: S1 and S3 (correct - only where participant is accepted_guaranteed). S2/S4 NOT shown (correct - waived).
